title: procris pedunculata var. eupedunculata
intro: Procris pedunculata var. eupedunculata, also known as the African willow, is a plant species native to Africa, characterized by its willow-like leaves and slender branches. The medicinal properties of Procris pedunculata var. eupedunculata include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include relief from fever, pain, and inflammation, as well as the treatment of wounds and skin conditions. Procris pedunculata var. eupedunculata can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, or used in the form of a tincture or poultice for topical application.
